success_criteria: delegation.md loads on src, include, tests, docs paths (not docs-only)
Mission Protocol is mandatory and names create/result/reflect/advance/close
WORKFLOW Gate 3 requires a review mission, not a bare agent spawn
CLAUDE.md operating principles forbid solo implementation by the leader
CLAUDE.md stays under 200 lines and delegation.md stays 80 or fewer
GIT.md Commit Messages section names the mission git trailers
it states a code commit with no mission trailer is a defect, not style
specifies the entry-widen / exit-restore approach for SDL2ST_EDIT
resolves SDL logical-size vs window-size and aspect-ratio/letterboxing
play grid geometry and on-screen size unchanged; palette fully visible with margin
restore-on-exit behavior specified; no leak into other modes
verification plan (visual gates 4-6 + any headless assertion) and files to change
cites original/editor.c and the modern constants; states whether z-spec is needed
